PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
SELECT ?pm ?pmLabel ?reasonLabel WHERE {
  ?pm wdt:P39 wd:Q858 ; p:P582 ?statement .
  ?statement ps:P582 ?endDate ; pq:P1534 ?reason .
  ?pm rdfs:label ?pmLabel .
  ?reason rdfs:label ?reasonLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?pmLabel) = "en")
  .
  FILTER(LANG(?reasonLabel) = "en")
  .
}
ORDER BY DESC(?endDate)
LIMIT 4
